para_trans: Under the Directorate of Libraries in 2026
Gazetted Group-B Cadre Officers
Regarding the General Changes in Administration....
Government of Maharashtra
Department of Higher and Technical Education
GOVERNMENT ORDER NO. SINCIPLE-2026 / P.S.No.78 / E-1636125 / GR.C.
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
Mantralaya Extension, Mumbai - 400032
Date: June 30, 2026.
Read - 1) Regulation of Maharashtra Government employees and performance of government duties.
The Prevention of Delay Act, 2005.
the order
Regulation of transfers and discharge of government duties of Maharashtra Government employees
Pursuant to and enabling the provisions of the Prevention of Delay in Dismantling Act, 2005
Group-B of the Directorate of Libraries and their Subordinate Offices with the approval of the authorities.
The officers named in the following prospectus of the gazetted cadre in front of their names in column 4.
Administrative transfers are being made to the following positions: -

It should also submit a report to the government within fifteen days.
The said Government Order is available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra www.maharashtra.gov.in.
